name: Orynth
description: Orynth (orynth.dev) is an innovative platform connecting early-stage builders with supportive communities on Solana. Founders list their active products — MVPs, live tools, or evolving apps — for free, gaining visibility, feedback, and engagement. Optional token markets let believers invest in "coins" reflecting conviction and attention, enabling creators to earn from community support. It bridges builders and backers in the Web3 space, fostering discovery and funding for promising projects.
